# Swap In The Polaris App

> How to buy and sell pETH on the bonding curve with quote, approval, and slippage checks.

Canonical URL: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/swap
Markdown URL: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/using-app/swap.md
Section: Use Polaris
Updated: 2026-06-12

Documentation index: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms.txt
Full documentation bundle: https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-full.txt

---

Swap provides a simple way to exchange between supported Polaris assets. Use it to acquire pETH, move between pAssets, or swap into supported test assets when available.

As the collateral foundation of the ecosystem, pETH is required for actions such as issuing pAssets, splitting into fpETH and vpETH, and accessing other protocol strategies. pETH swaps route through the Polaris bonding curve.

![Polaris Swap tab showing the buy/sell direction, the WETH to pETH bonding-curve route, quote, and slippage controls](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/screenshots/swap.jpg)

## Basic Flow

1. Choose the direction: buy pETH with WETH, or sell pETH for WETH.
2. Enter the amount.
3. Review the quote and route.
4. Check minimum received, fees, and slippage.
5. Approve the input token if prompted.
6. Sign the swap transaction.
7. Confirm your pETH or WETH balance updates.

For stale quotes or reverted swaps, see [Troubleshooting](https://tokenbrice.github.io/polaris-docs/troubleshooting).
